PAKE
ONLINE INSTALLER
EXPERIMENTAL

Verified cloud build

Install the latest build.

This lightweight installer resolves the newest successful build, verifies its SHA-256 digest, and atomically activates the portable application payload.

  1. 01 Resolve Find the latest successful release
  2. 02 Download Fetch the compressed application payload
  3. 03 Verify Match size and SHA-256
  4. 04 Install Extract, activate, and launch the app
Waiting to resolve a build —

Ready. An internet connection and installation permission may be required.

LIVE STREAM

00:00:00 SYSTEM No installer process has started yet.
IDLE download and activation logs are preserved
